title: Mama's Heart. Gongadze
overview: Lesya Gongadze's unique lifetime film confession about the most intimate and inspiring moments of her life and her two sons, filmed in Ukraine, Georgia, Estonia, and France with music by composer Volodymyr Hronskyi. Lesya Gongadze's life story will take you to Georgia, Estonia, and France, revealing her prophetic words. You will learn from her about her family, Georgiy's incredible adventures, meet his grandmother, see places dear to their hearts, and discover the love story of this legendary woman.
